attendance.clock_in_confirmation: Hello {{employeeName}}, your attendance has been recorded at {{time}} WIB.
attendance.clock_out_confirmation: Hello {{employeeName}}, your departure has been recorded at {{time}} WIB.
attendance.clock_in_tardy: Hello {{employeeName}}, your attendance has been recorded at {{time}} WIB. You are {{minutes}} minutes late.
attendance.tardiness_report_none: No employees were late today. Great job everyone!

leave.request_submitted: Your {{leaveType}} leave request has been submitted and is pending approval.
leave.request_approved: Your {{leaveType}} leave request from {{startDate}} to {{endDate}} has been approved.
leave.request_rejected: Your {{leaveType}} leave request has been rejected. Reason: {{reason}}
leave.insufficient_balance: Your leave balance is insufficient. Remaining balance: {{remaining}} days.
leave.balance_info: Your leave balance: {{remaining}} days remaining out of {{total}} days total.

onboarding.step_failed: Onboarding step {{stepNumber}} ({{stepName}}) has failed. HR will follow up.
onboarding.workflow_completed: Your onboarding process is complete. Welcome aboard!

checkin.form_distributed: The weekly check-in form is now available. Please complete it before end of day.
checkin.reminder: Reminder: You haven't completed your weekly check-in form. Please fill it out soon.

warning.issued: Warning Letter ({{level}}) has been issued on {{date}}.
